ptxt.intxrefpoff: Clutch Release System Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Clutch Release Bearing
servinfosub.ptxt: Check clutch release bearing (1) for smooth rotation. If abnormality is found, replace it.

attention2.ptxt: If the release bearing is washed, the grease contained within the release bearing may wash away, causing the bearing to seize up. Do not wash the release bearing.

servinfosub.title: Clutch Release Shaft
servinfosub.ptxt: Check clutch release shaft and its pin for deflection or damage.
If abnormality is found, replace it.
